name: b3Ɛq NG — OCR Invoice Ingestion Pipeline

nodes.name: Webhook — Invoice Upload
nodes.notes: POST multipart/form-data: { file: PDF/image, entity_id?, vendor_name? }

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ '⚠️ *b3Ɛq OCR Invoice — Needs Review*

Vendor: ' + $json.vendor_name + '
Invoice: ' + $json.invoice_number + '
Net Amount: ₦' + $json.total_net.toLocaleString() + '
VAT Variance: ₦' + $json.vat_variance + '
Status: Staged — please verify before posting' }}

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
={{ '✅ *b3Ɛq OCR Invoice Processed*

Vendor: ' + $json.vendor_name + '
Invoice #: ' + $json.invoice_number + '
Date: ' + $json.invoice_date + '
Net: ₦' + $json.total_net.toLocaleString() + '
VAT (7.5%): ₦' + $json.total_tax.toLocaleString() + '
WHT (' + $json.wht_code + ' ' + $json.wht_rate + '): ₦' + $json.wht_amount.toLocaleString() + '
Net Payable: ₦' + $json.net_payable.toLocaleString() + '

→ Post via WHT Calculator page' }}
